hero.title: An Arabic knowledge platform for research, publishing, and consulting
hero.subtitle: An institutional space for Arabic knowledge, bringing rigorous research, specialized publishing, and consulting services into a trusted environment.
hero.quote: Ahmed Al-Dah Platform is an Arabic knowledge platform for research, publishing, and consulting, combining scientific publishing, knowledge archives, and consulting services in a professional environment designed to remain a knowledge reference for decades.

metadata.title: Ahmed Al-Dah Consulting & Research
metadata.description: Specialized consulting and research services by Ahmed Al-Dah.

hero.title: Consulting & Research
hero.subtitle: Knowledge expertise translated into practical solutions
hero.description: We deliver specialized consulting and research services for organizations and individuals, with a commitment to quality, rigor, and knowledge governance.

intro.title: About the Office
intro.body: Ahmed Al-Dah Consulting & Research extends Ahmed Al-Dah's intellectual path, combining deep analysis with field experience to support decision-making and knowledge production.

metadata.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
metadata.description: Set up two-factor authentication for your account.

MfaSetup.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
MfaSetup.description: Enhance your account security by enabling two-factor authentication. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app, then enter the verification code.
MfaSetup.step1Description: Use Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, or any compatible authenticator app to scan the QR code below.

form.label: Enter the 6-digit code
form.hint: Enter the code displayed in your authenticator app

errors.generic: Failed to set up two-factor authentication. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: The code you entered is invalid or has expired.
errors.alreadyEnabled: Two-factor authentication is already enabled for your account.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to set up two-factor authentication.

MfaSetup.success: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully.

metadata.title: Verify Two-Factor Authentication
metadata.description: Enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.

MfaVerify.title: Verify Two-Factor Authentication
MfaVerify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify your identity.

form.label: Enter the 6-digit code
form.hint: Check your authenticator app for the code

errors.generic: Failed to verify the code. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: The code you entered is invalid or has expired.
errors.unauthorized: You do not have permission to verify at this time.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

warning.title: Session Expiring Soon
warning.description: Your session will expire in 1 minute due to inactivity. Click below to stay logged in.
